fails.why: L75 login still returns JWT in response body res.json({ token, ... }); only OAuth callback uses httpOnly cookie
L72 algorithm: 'HS256' on public /api/auth/login; RS256 required for public APIs
L99 jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) passes no issuer/audience options; iss/aud not validated
Token is 1h (short-lived) but no refresh token rotation mechanism anywhere; assertion requires both
Only default helmet() CSP; no nonce/hash-based CSP configured, default uses 'self' without nonce
Token exchange L226-230 sends only client_id/secret/code; no code_verifier/code_challenge PKCE
PUT /users/:id and POST /admin/convert have no CSRF token verification, only SameSite/Bearer
L262 JSON.parse(req.body) with no Stripe-Signature / constructEvent verification
Logging via console.log L265 / console.error L288; no structured audit log with timestamp/user_id/action/resource/result/IP
L200-205 manual regex .replace() escaping instead of DOMPurify with explicit allowed tags
